title: Bombies 80K
description: One of the best bedwars packs from back in the days for sure
body: Bombies 80K is a clean and smooth PvP texture pack made for fast-paced Bedwars, Skywars, and competitive Minecraft gameplay. Featuring short swords, vibrant colors, custom particles, low-fire visuals, and optimized textures for FPS boosts, this pack gives you the perfect mix of performance and style. Designed for sweaty PvP players, Bombies 80K delivers crisp hits, clean GUI, and an overall satisfying combat experience that helps you dominate every match.
